zh.Comborn, Corrèze, Limousin, France: 法國利姆辛可雷可姆恩
zh.Rochechouart, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aqu: 法國努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安洛瓦爾特
zh.Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitain: 法國努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安利莫格斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Limoges於大約1215年出生在法國時，她的父親Guy III de Limoges60歲，母親Ermengarde de Barry41歲。她於1233年與Aymery VIII de Rochechouart在法國努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安洛瓦爾特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1259年9月9日享年45歲。

zh-hans.Comborn, Corrèze, Limousin, France: 法国利姆辛可雷可姆恩
zh-hans.Rochechouart, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aqu: 法国努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安洛瓦爾特
zh-hans.Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitain: 法国努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安利莫格斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de Limoges于大约1215年出生在法国时，她的父亲Guy III de Limoges60岁，母亲Ermengarde de Barry41岁。她于1233年与Aymery VIII de Rochechouart在法国努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安洛瓦爾特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1259年9月9日享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Limoges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Emile, Fernand, Gaston, Jacques, Monique, Muguette, Pierre, Rosaire.
French: habitational name from the city of Limoges and of several other places in the southwestern part of France.
History: Pierre Amand dit Jolicoeur and Limoges from Bordeaux in Gironde, France, married Catherine Grenier in Montreal, QC, in 1698.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Limoges was born about 1215, in France, her father, Guy III de Limoges, was 60 and her mother, Ermengarde de Barry, was 41. She married Aymery VIII de Rochechouart in 1233, in Rochechouart, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 9 September 1259, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Limoges est née environ 1215, à France, son père, Guy III de Limoges, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde de Barry, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Aymery VIII de Rochechouart en 1233, à Rochechouart, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 septembre 1259, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Limoges um 1215 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guy III de Limoges 60 und ihre Mutter Ermengarde de Barry 41. Sie hat 1233 in Rochechouart, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich Aymery VIII de Rochechouart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. September 1259 im Alter von 45 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Limoges è nata il circa 1215 nel Francia, sua padre, Guy III de Limoges, aveva 60 anni e sua madre, Ermengarde de Barry, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Aymery VIII de Rochechouart nel 1233, nel Rochechouart, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 9 settembre 1259, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.Rochechouart, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aqu: フランスノウベレ-アクイティアインハウテ-ヴィエンロチェチオウアルト
ja.Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitain: フランスノウベレ-アクイティアインハウテ-ヴィエンリモジェズ
ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Limogesが約1215年にフランスで生まれた時，父Guy III de Limogesは60歳，母Ermengarde de Barryは41歳であった。1233年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインハウテ-ヴィエンロチェチオウアルトでAymery VIII de Rochechouartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1259年9月9日に45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Limoges(이)가 대략 1215년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy III de Limoges(은)는 60세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ermengarde de Barry(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1233년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 하테-비니 록헤초우아르트에서 Aymery VIII de Rochechouart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1259년 9월 9일 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Limoges nasceu aproximadamente 1215, em França, seu pai, Guy III de Limoges, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Ermengarde de Barry, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Aymery VIII de Rochechouart em 1233, em Rochechouart, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1259, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Limoges родилась около 1215 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени Guy III de Limoges было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermengarde de Barry, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Aymery VIII de Rochechouart в 1233 г. в местности рошечоуарт, хауте-виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 9 сентября 1259 г. в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de Limoges nació aproximadamente 1215, en Francia, su papá, Guy III de Limoges, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Ermengarde de Barry, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Aymery VIII de Rochechouart en 1233, en Rochechouart, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1259, a la edad de 45 años.
